div1.entryFree:
Cloud, vb., 1) trans. to overspread with clouds, to darken: Lucr. 1007. LLL V, 2, 203. R2 III, 2, 68. H6C II, 3, 7. IV, 1, 74. Per. I, 1, 74. to hear my sovereign mistress --ed so, Wint. I, 2, 280 (== darkened, stained).
2) intr. to become dark with clouds: had not his (eyes) --ed with his brow's repine, Ven. 490. the scene begins to c. LLL V, 2, 731.
